## Generated output
Attach the PNG(s) that look wrong.

## Topic / prompt
What did you ask for?

## What's wrong
Specific issues: spacing, alignment, font choice, color, hierarchy, etc.

## Brand profile
Share the relevant `taste-profile.json` (redact if needed).

## What you expected
Reference images or a description of the right look.
